item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 7min Deep Impact Victoire Pisa Orfevre Contrail Lovcen
Lovcen adds his name to an illus
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 7min Deep Impact Victoire Pisa Orfevre Contrail Lovcen
Lovcen adds his name to an illustrious list of horses to have landed the Satsuki Shō, doing so in tenacious fashion from the front and in record time!
Another rising star for Japan?
@netkeiba #ロブチェン 3 7 827

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 13min Meet the Racing Post's first ever Newmarket correspondent - who used it as the launchpad
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 13min Meet the Racing Post's first ever Newmarket correspondent - who used it as the launchpad for an astonishing career
Peter Thomas talks to journalist-turned-trainer Simon Crisford about the charms and challenges of life on the Heath De racingpost.com 749
